description: CompositionBurnt brown round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with a ribbed collar and graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoUnleash volleyball fury with this burnt brown tee from adidas.
